differentials.name: ankylosing spondylitis (erosions and ankylosis of SI joints
differentials.raw: ankylosing spondylitis (erosions and ankylosis of SI joints

context: joint narrowing + subchondral sclerosis | prominence of intraarticular osteochondral fragments | relative lack of prominent osteophyte formation | small calcifications in paraarticular soft tissues + tendon insertions
